channel.title: J. Marcus Hughes
channel.description: Recent content on J. Marcus Hughes

item.title: A New Beginning
item.description: Welcome Welcome to my new site! Why the transition? I’ve been unhappy with how bloated my old website felt. It also scored poorly on Google searchability. I want something that’s easier to maintain and just a plain interface. Enter hugo-blog-awesome. Accessing the old content I plan to transition all the old content to this new format, at least all the old content that I deem interesting still. Stay tuned for how that will work.

item.title: Barnsley
item.description: Barnsley is a tool I’ve created to visualize iterated function systems, like the one shown above. You can access it via the website or by building it yourself from source. You can find the source code for the library and for the graphical user interface(GUI) on GitHub. The GUI is currently implemented using Rust’s egui. Let’s back up a bit though. What is an iterated function system? An iterated function system or IFS is a formal mathematical structure.
